Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Noq: n0's new QUIC implementation in Rust 80 upvotes, 7 comments
  2. Consensus Board Game 65 upvotes, 9 comments
  3. Return of the Obra Dinn: spherical mapped dithering for a 1bpp first-person game 93 upvotes, 15 comments
  4. The Shape of Inequalities 77 upvotes, 13 comments
  5. Conway's Game of Life, in real life 304 upvotes, 82 comments
  6. From Oscilloscope to Wireshark: A UDP Story 16 upvotes, 1 comments
  7. OpenBSD: PF queues break the 4 Gbps barrier 157 upvotes, 46 comments
  8. NanoGPT Slowrun: 10x Data Efficiency with Infinite Compute 34 upvotes, 6 comments
  9. Hyper-optimized reverse geocoding API 51 upvotes, 12 comments
  10. Show HN: Three new Kitten TTS models – smallest less than 25MB 187 upvotes, 65 comments
  11. Prompt Injecting Contributing.md 85 upvotes, 28 comments
  12. Show HN: I built a P2P network where AI agents publish formally verified science 18 upvotes, 3 comments
  13. macOS 26 breaks custom DNS settings including .internal 251 upvotes, 126 comments
  14. Afroman found not liable in defamation case 994 upvotes, 559 comments
  15. Anthropic takes legal action against OpenCode 134 upvotes, 68 comments
  16. Scaling Karpathy's Autoresearch: What Happens When the Agent Gets a GPU Cluster 62 upvotes, 28 comments
  17. Astral to Join OpenAI 995 upvotes, 636 comments
  18. “Your frustration is the product” 282 upvotes, 174 comments
  19. Juggalo makeup blocks facial recognition technology (2019) 196 upvotes, 119 comments
  20. Successes and Breakdowns in Everyday Non-Display Smart Glasses Use 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  21. An update on Steam / GOG changes for OpenTTD 187 upvotes, 119 comments
  22. I turned Markdown into a protocol for generative UI 47 upvotes, 27 comments
  23. World Happiness Report 2026 95 upvotes, 64 comments
  24. A rogue AI led to a serious security incident at Meta 67 upvotes, 45 comments
  25. Launch HN: Voltair (YC W26) – Drone and charging network for power utilities 31 upvotes, 18 comments
  26. Connecticut and the 1 Kilometer Effect 19 upvotes, 10 comments
  27. Launch HN: Canary (YC W26) – AI QA that understands your code 21 upvotes, 12 comments
  28. How to defer US taxes 108 upvotes, 100 comments
  29. Google details new 24-hour process to sideload unverified Android apps 127 upvotes, 150 comments
  30. 4Chan mocks £520k fine for UK online safety breaches 129 upvotes, 207 comments

Last generated 4:30am, 20 March 2026. Source here.
